title: hymenophyllum splendidum
intro: Hymenophyllum splendidum, also known as the Splendid Rasp fern or New Zealand fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum splendidum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the fern's leaves and stems.
